$comment: Cross-repo handshake vectors for env_hash parity (DIAG.C4). Recipe: envHash = sha256(canonical_json(env)).hexdigest()[:32], lowercase hex, where canonical_json = json.dumps(env, sort_keys=True, separators=(',',':')) encoded UTF-8, and env is exactly the six-field block {os, python, torch, torchCuda, driver, comfyuiVersion}. This exact file is mirrored into any consuming repo; every env_hash implementation must pass every vector.

vectors.name: reordered-keys
vectors.$comment: Same block, keys deliberately out of order — canonicalization must make it hash identically to 'nominal'.

vectors.name: driver-unknown
vectors.$comment: The literal token 'unknown' is an honest state (DIAG.C4) and hashes as such.
